final_state.incident_window: NimbusAPI May 2026 major unannounced outage dispute
final_state.ruling_reason: The independent monitor reported an uptime of 96.8%, which is below the 98.00% threshold set in SLA-4 for a full refund. There were no announced maintenance windows to exclude any downtime, as confirmed by the maintenance announcements. Therefore, the downtime is not excused, and the SLA is breached, warranting a full refund.
